mapper.select: select id, task_name, task_group, task_type, base_url, cron, enabled, notify_enabled, notify_scene_id, notify_trigger, remark, created_at, updated_at from scheduler_task order by id desc

select id, task_name, task_group, task_type, base_url, cron, enabled, notify_enabled, notify_scene_id, notify_trigger, remark, created_at, updated_at from scheduler_task where enabled = 1 order by id desc
